violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the dry storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2025

At the time of inspection, no running water was available. Per interview with PIC, the town issued a notice of water shut off, and water service is expected to be restored on 11/13. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2025

Cheese packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Cheese was removed from shelf and must not be distributed until labels are placed on packages. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
